parsed_output.justification: Dan claims to have seen two werewolves in the center, implying no werewolves among the players. This contradicts the numerous accusations and the fact that several players are claiming to be werewolves themselves. His statement is the most suspicious and likely a lie to protect himself. Eliminating Dan would remove a probable werewolf and give the village a better chance to win.
